title: PORTLAND COMMUNITY COLLEGE - 211info
text: PORTLAND COMMUNITY COLLEGE ROCK CREEK CAMPUS PORTLAND COMMUNITY COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of educational, vocational, college credit, and developmental courses, including adult basic education, GED test instruction, continuing education opportunities, and English as a Second Language. 17705 NW Springville Road Portland, OR 97229 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-4pm (971) 722-6111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 722-6111 Toll-free (866) 922-1010 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to register FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Completed application packet LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adult Basic Education Community Colleges English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - COLLEGE ASSISTANCE MIGRANT PROGRAM FOOD - PANTHER PANTRY LEGAL SERVICES - SOAR IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES/PCC IMMIGRATION CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
